semantics.modelLoadMinusPipelineMs: modelLoadMs - pipeline.totalMs; harness, storage, manifest, GPU init, and pipeline construction
semantics.pipelineMinusLoaderMs: pipeline.totalMs - loader.totalMs; config, tokenizer, KV, RoPE, and other pipeline setup

semantics.effectiveSubmitReadbackWaitMs: max(decodeSubmitWaitMs, decodeReadbackWaitMs); submit and readback waits overlap.
semantics.readbackMapWaitMs: Wall time awaiting staging-buffer mapAsync; usually includes GPU completion behind the readback.
semantics.gpuTimestampMs: Timestamp-query GPU work when available; null means it was not captured.
semantics.topOps: Highest-count exact compute-pass labels observed during command recording.
semantics.topOpGroups: Highest-count compute-pass labels after grouping repeated per-layer labels.
semantics.uniformCache: Current uniform-buffer cache counters at the end of the measured suite.

metrics.prompt: En efecto, un 25% de afroamericanos, un 15% de personas que ganan menos de 35.000 dólares al año, un 18% de los ciudadanos de más de 65 años y un 20% de los electores de entre 18 y 29 años no cuentan con un documento de identidad con fotografía.
metrics.generatedText: In fact, 25% of African Americans, 15% of people earning less than $35,000 a year, 18% of citizens over 65 years old, and 20% of voters between 18 and 29 years old do not have an identity document with a photograph.

prompt.identity: En efecto, un 25% de afroamericanos, un 15% de personas que ganan menos de 35.000 dólares al año, un 18% de los ciudadanos de más de 65 años y un 20% de los electores de entre 18 y 29 años no cuentan con un documento de identidad con fotografía.

logits.reason: Per-step logits digests were not requested for this browser harness run.

tolerance.kvPolicy: metadata hash only; KV tensor bytes are not read back by default
